title: mammea timorensis
intro: Mammea timorensis is a plant species native to Timor, Indonesia, belonging to the family Clusiaceae. It is a type of tree known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mammea timorensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
